title: androstylium fockeanum
intro: Androstylium fockeanum, also known as Focke's androstylium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. The herbal preparation of Androstylium fockeanum typically involves drying the plant, then infusing it in hot water to make a tea, or using it in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal decoction.
